violations.text: Several TCS foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
Refrigerator (produce) door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The door to the (service area) toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair, observed missing tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The ceiling tiles in the ware washing area is in poor repair, observed peeling and cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024
